Three bedroom apartment for sale at By Long Hill Residence near TEG in Tirana. It is located on the 2nd floor of a building currently under construction. The apartment offers a total surface of 195.95 m2 and an internal surface of 175.21 m2, organized into a living room, separate kitchen, 3 bedrooms, laundry room, 3 bathrooms, balcony, and veranda. The complex is currently in the structural phase and is being built at a fast pace with high quality standards.

Price: 353.000 euro
